cookieModalConfirmationBanner.enable.title: Enable Cookie Modal Banner
cookieModalConfirmationBanner.enable.description: Check this box to enable the cookie modal banner

cookieModalConfirmationBanner.logoURL.title: Logo URL
cookieModalConfirmationBanner.logoURL.description: Enter the URL location of the logo image file that is displayed at cookie modal

cookieModalConfirmationBanner.cookieLife.title: Cookie Expiry in Days
cookieModalConfirmationBanner.cookieLife.description: Enter the maximum number of days to display cookie modal banner.

cookieModalConfirmationBanner.alertMessa.title: Alert Message
cookieModalConfirmationBanner.alertMessa.description: Enter the alert message to display cookie modal banner.
cookieModalConfirmationBanner.alertMessa.default: You need to be 18 years of age and older

cookieModalConfirmationBanner.monthForma.title: Month Format
cookieModalConfirmationBanner.monthForma.description: Choose an option to specify which format do you want to display for the Month field.

cookieModalConfirmationBanner.startYear.title: Start of the Year
cookieModalConfirmationBanner.startYear.description: Enter the year on when the form starts.

cookieModalConfirmationBanner.endYear.title: End of the Year
cookieModalConfirmationBanner.endYear.description: Enter the year on when the form ends.

cookieModalConfirmationBanner.welcome.title: Welcome Heading
cookieModalConfirmationBanner.welcome.description: Enter the welcome heading to display cookie modal banner.

cookieModalConfirmationBanner.descriptio.title: Description
cookieModalConfirmationBanner.descriptio.default:
You must be 18 years old to use this site.

Please enter your date of birth
